falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below the 200-day moving average by 3.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bear market trend, contradicting the pattern's implication of a potential bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume surges to 250% above the 30-day average during a sustained price decline
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Excessive volume during decline would signal panic selling and invalidate the hold signal by confirming a breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 65+ within 14 days while the price makes a new 52-week low
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination would confirm a blowoff top pattern rather than a bottom, directly contradicting the original pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
